name: codex-augment-dispatcher
description: Route agent work through dynamic workflow artifacts, subagent fanout, extensible external CLI adapters, high-quality media guidance, GSAP motion guidance, deterministic asset workflows, and Plugin evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Auto-route workflows, subagents, media, frontend, GSAP motion, and assets.
interface.longDescription: Codex Augment Dispatcher is an extensible adapter hub for platform-neutral agent dynamic workflows, external CLIs, high-quality media guidance, GSAP motion guidance, deterministic generated-asset workflows, and background thread/subagent fanout while preserving the owner agent as the local executor and verifier. It should be considered for non-trivial tasks and explicitly triggered by workflow artifacts, approval gates, subagents/packets, background threads, agent threads, worker-agent fanout, planning/decomposition, stuck/brainstorming, current research/latest info, external critique/risk review, creative direction, frontend/UI/landing page/redesign/animation, GSAP/ScrollTrigger/parallax motion, browser visual verification, image/video asset generation, generated icon/sprite sheet slicing, and Grok video requests. SVG and emoji are prohibited as default visual assets; custom icons default to image_gen sheets sliced with asset-slicer. The initial adapters are dynamic-workflow, Claude task-gate/thinking-gate, Grok augment, AGY frontend, GSAP animation guidance, and asset-slicer. Future CLI adapters can be added as separate skills, scripts, tests, and dispatch rules without renaming the plugin.
defaultPrompt: Before non-trivial work, classify the route; required helper routes need Plugin evidence.
Route workflow/subagent/thread/fanout/plan/frontend/media/assets via dynamic-workflow, task-gate, AGY, GSAP, image_gen, slicer.
Fan out read-only subagents by default for independent research/review/validation; owner keeps final claims.
